abilities.name: Expert Educator
abilities.text: Once per activation. When another ally within 6" declares an attack action, it may receive a (+).

abilities.name: Impossible Movement
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage by an attack, it may drain a (soulstone) to place itself anywhere within 4" of its current location.

abilities.name: Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Dawn Staff
actions.effects: This model gains a Chi token. Enemy models within (melee)2" of this model are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: The Teacher is Now the Student
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare an action printed on the stat card of an ally in LoS.

triggers.name: Aggressive Chi
triggers.text: Remove a Chi token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: The River's Wrath
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This model may remove a Chi token.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (melee)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Slow token. If this model removed a Chi token, increase the (melee) of this action by 2".

actions.name: Years of Practice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target may attach a Fighting Style upgrade and may declare an action. This model may drain a (fortitude) to attach a Fighting Style upgrade to another ally within range.

triggers.name: Spiritual Alignment
triggers.text: Allies within (melee)2" of either this model or the target gain a Chi token.
